data.content: Implemented the history agent-label fix on branch foolery-b45e. Response entries now extract provider/model identity from response metadata with OpenRouter-specific precedence, session headers reuse that metadata-derived identity instead of stale session_start Codex fields, and response rows prefer entry identity without leaking the old session version. Added regression coverage in agent-history session parsing plus SessionCard rendering. Validation run in the worktree: bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/agent-history-sessions.test.ts src/components/__tests__/agent-history-session-card.test.tsx; bun run lint src/lib/agent-history.ts src/lib/agent-history-parse.ts src/lib/agent-history-identity.ts src/components/agent-history-utils.tsx src/components/agent-history-session-card.tsx src/components/agent-history-response-row.tsx src/lib/__tests__/agent-history-sessions.test.ts src/components/__tests__/agent-history-session-card.test.tsx; bunx tsc --noEmit. Commit: 003ff2fc4dc8
